{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Simon's mother
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's mother]] has black hair and uses a short walking stick.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
